articles.title: US judiciary asked to adopt rule to curb fake AI-generated cases in filings
articles.description: A federal judge in Florida on Friday asked the judiciary to adopt a nationwide rule to ensure that litigants using generative AI have ensured that any court filings they submit ​do not cite fake cases hallucinated by the technology.

articles.title: AI Costs Are Forcing Big Companies to Put Limits on Workers: Report
articles.description: Some of the country's biggest companies are beginning to ration access to AI for employers, track their usage more aggressively, and steer tem toward cheaper tools as costs rise faster than expected.
articles.content:
Corporate America is discovering that artificial intelligence may be revolutionary, but it is also noting that it is not cheap and as a result is beginning to ration access to its employees in an effort to cut costs.
